introSection: Happy Mountain is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Mampato in Lo Barnechea, Metropolitan Región, Chile.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has the standard Wacky Worm layout.

fullText:
Happy Mountain is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Mampato in Lo Barnechea, Metropolitan Región, Chile.

The ride has the standard Wacky Worm layout.
